productDisplayName: Puma Women Osu NM Black Purple Shoe
description: Let the modern look of the puma Osu NM help bring you closer to that clean and simple style you've been looking for. Stylish and comfortable, it makes for a great casula wear.Upper Synthetic suede and mesh upper with embroidered logo Bootie construction and hook-and-loop closure for easy wear and removal Lushly padded collar to avoid shoe bite Midsole has an Eco-Ortholite footbed, an environmentally friendly foam insole that retains its shape over time, offering a consistent Fit Flexible CM-EVA midsole for cushioned comfort Outsole Carbon rubber outsole for durability and grip Deep flex grooves for optimal flexibility
